website.label: Website
website.headline: Project Management Structure: certification and career guidance
website.subheadline: Book a free mentor intro or a paid pathway session. Cite the page or asset on the site when you schedule.
website.targetMessage: Name the page or asset you came from so we align the session to your certification goal.

consultationTiers.title: Free Mentor Intro
consultationTiers.description: 15-minute conversation on certification goal, timeline, and which pathway fits. Cite the site page or asset when you book.

consultationTiers.title: Career & Pathway Session
consultationTiers.description: Structured mentor block for exam prep, pathway depth, or services you chose on the website.

consultationTiers.title: Services Discussion
consultationTiers.description: Review services you selected on the Project Management Structure website. Cite the page or package when you book.
